text: Being here, I feel detached from the suggestion of a tea trip, as though my desires do not quite match the trajectory of those around me. The clean, functional space and the glare of the displays make my thoughts echo, questioning the routines we follow and the rituals—like tea—that we sometimes refuse. I’m a bit restless, surrounded by order and reason, yet thoughts of resistance and autonomy nudge quietly at the edge of my mind.
